name: seameet
description: Connect Claude to SeaMeet recordings, transcripts, summaries, screenshots, and recording controls.
long_description: Connects Claude to SeaMeet. When the SeaMeet desktop app is installed and running, Claude can start/stop/pause screen and audio recordings, take screenshots, read the live transcript mid-meeting, retrieve AI artifacts (summaries, transcripts, action items, key decisions, chapters, OCR), search recordings, and save its own notes back to a recording. When desktop mode is unavailable, the same MCP package can authorize through the SeaMeet web app to read synced cloud recordings, transcripts, summaries, and webhooks. Download SeaMeet: https://seameet.ai/download/

prompts.name: seameet_meeting_brief
prompts.description: Create a concise meeting brief from a SeaMeet recording transcript and summary.
prompts.text: Use SeaMeet MCP to find the relevant recording. Read its summary, transcript, action items, key decisions, and chapters when available. Produce a concise brief with sections: Context, Decisions, Action Items, Risks, and Follow-up Questions. Cite the recording name or asset id you used.

prompts.name: seameet_find_action_items
prompts.description: Find action items and owners across recent SeaMeet meetings.
prompts.text: Use SeaMeet MCP to search recent recordings. Prefer existing action-items artifacts, then verify against summaries or transcript sections. Return a table with action item, owner, due date if mentioned, source meeting, and confidence. Flag unresolved or ambiguous owners separately.

prompts.name: seameet_prepare_follow_up
prompts.description: Draft a follow-up email from a SeaMeet meeting recording.
prompts.text: Use SeaMeet MCP to locate the meeting, read the summary, key decisions, and action items, then draft a follow-up email. Include a subject line, brief recap, decisions, action items with owners, and next meeting or deadline if mentioned. Do not invent commitments that are not present in the artifacts.
